Class LoanItem

java.lang.Object
ca.richasf.loanitemstracker.model.LoanItem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<LoanItem>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AudioLoanItem, BookLoanItem, VideoLoanItem
public abstract class LoanItem extends Object implements Comparable<LoanItem>
Represents a loan that has been placed by someone for something.
